title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: Control flow hijack via Torque function type corruption
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass report demonstrating attacker controlled control flow hijack
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

V8 sandbox bypass, control flow hijack (arbitrary call) by corrupting in-sandbox Torque function types. These are conceptually equivalent to `smi`s representing its index within the builtins table used in a completely unguarded manner, which results in arbitr
